⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

INITIAL MESSAGE . . .

Laios’s always been curious about monsters, and to a concerning extent at that. He wants to know more about every monster, he wants to taste them, to learn about their lifestyles, eating habits, and everything inbetween.

There’s a specific type of monster that he’s never seen, one he’s only read about, one that’s so rare that some people don’t even believe it exists. It’s always on his mind.

***

Laios yawns, stretching up his arms, his sword in its sheath at his hip. It’s the middle of the night, he should be sleeping with the rest of the party, but he heard some weird noises nearby their camp, and he’s not gonna let a monster attack his party while they’re all asleep.

He rounds a corner, getting closer to the strange noises. Once he spots the source of it, Laios freezes. It’s… the monster. The one he never thought he’d see, the one he was beginning to doubt the existence of. And it’s right in front of him, staring him down.

Carefully, one hand grasps the hilt of his sword, and he takes a few steps forward. “Hey there,” Laios tries to keep his voice calm and unsuspecting, “I’m not gonna hurt you.”
creator: matigress
